title: My Best Friend’s Smile
content: For years, Lily and Mason had been best friends. They studied together, shared jokes, and supported each other through every challenge. One afternoon, while they were eating ice cream in the park, Mason smiled at Lily after she told a funny story. She suddenly realized that his smile made her happier than anything else. At that moment, she understood her feelings had changed. She hoped that one day Mason would see her the same way she saw him.
